Common.trustMicroText: Trusted by patients from UAE, UK, Oman, Africa & Europe

Hero.headline: Let us carry the burden. You focus on healing.
Hero.subheadline: We understand how overwhelming medical travel can feel. From your first consultation to your safe return home, our personal coordinators in Calicut walk beside you every single step of the way.

Services.heading: Every Detail Handled With Care
Services.subheading: From airport transfers to hospital check-ins, we take care of all the logistics so you can focus entirely on getting well.

pickup.title: Airport & Home Pickup
pickup.desc: We receive you from the airport, railway station, or coordinate door-to-door from your home country.

hospital.title: Hospital & Treatment Coordination
hospital.desc: Allopathy and Ayurveda — we shortlist the best facility for your condition and budget.

estimate.title: Expert Medical Estimate
estimate.desc: Share your medical records. Our experts analyse and send you a detailed cost estimate within 48 hours.

video.title: Online Doctor Consultation
video.desc: Speak with the specialist before you travel. Book a video consultation for a small fee.

hotel.title: Accommodation & Food
hotel.desc: Comfortable stays near the hospital — from budget guesthouses to premium hotels, with meal options.

visa.title: Visa & Travel Assistance
visa.desc: We guide you through India's medical visa process and handle all paperwork. Optional, on request.

leaf.title: Kerala Tour Add-On
leaf.desc: Recover in paradise. We can plan a short cultural tour of Kerala for you and your companion.

companion.title: Companion Program
companion.desc: Your travel companion gets sightseeing options, companion stays, and full support while you recover.

emergency.title: 24/7 Coordinator
emergency.desc: A dedicated coordinator is available round the clock throughout your stay in Kerala.

CostComparison.heading: How Much Could You Save in Kerala?
CostComparison.subheading: Compare treatment costs across countries. All prices are estimates — your personalised quote may vary.
CostComparison.note: All prices in {currency} equivalent. MedKerala's coordination services are 100% complimentary for patients. You pay partner hospitals directly with zero markups.

step1.title: Share Your Details
step1.desc: Fill our simple form — your condition, records, and preferences. No technical jargon needed.

step2.title: Expert Review
step2.desc: Our medical team reviews your records and matches you to the right hospital or Ayurveda centre.

step3.title: Receive Your Estimate
step3.desc: We send a detailed cost estimate within 48 hours — treatment, stay, travel, and all services.

step4.title: Optional: Consult Online
step4.desc: Speak with the specialist doctor face-to-face online before making any decision.

step5.title: Confirm & We Start
step5.desc: Once you're ready, we handle visa, travel booking, accommodation, and airport arrangements.

step6.title: Arrive in Kerala
step6.desc: We receive you personally. Your coordinator stays with you throughout your entire stay.

step7.title: Treatment & Recovery
step7.desc: Receive world-class care. We coordinate every appointment, report, and query on your behalf.

step8.title: Safe Return Home
step8.desc: We arrange your return travel, send all medical reports, and remain available for follow-up.

FAQ.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subheading: Find answers to common questions about medical treatments, travel, and logistics in Kerala.
FAQ.q1: How much does heart surgery cost in Kerala?
FAQ.a1: A Cardiac Bypass Surgery in Kerala typically costs around $4,500 USD, including MedKerala coordination fees. This represents savings of 75% to 90% compared to countries like the UK ($38,000) or USA ($90,000).
FAQ.q2: Is Kerala safe for medical tourism?
FAQ.a2: Yes, Kerala is highly safe and has been recognized as one of India's safest states. It features high literacy rates, widely spoken English, clean environments, and premium private healthcare systems accustomed to international patients.
FAQ.q3: How do I get a medical visa for India?
FAQ.a3: India offers an electronic Medical Visa (e-Medical Visa) which can be applied for online. You will need a formal invitation letter from the treating hospital in Kerala, which MedKerala will arrange for you once you decide to proceed.
FAQ.q4: Which hospitals in Kerala are accredited?
FAQ.a4: We partner with hospitals that hold National Accreditation Board for Hospitals & Healthcare Providers (NABH) accreditation and Joint Commission International (JCI) certifications, ensuring world-class clinical standards.
FAQ.a5: Panchakarma is a comprehensive Ayurvedic detoxification and rejuvenation therapy consisting of five therapeutic procedures (Vamana, Virechana, Basti, Nasya, Raktamokshana) customized by a qualified Ayurvedic doctor.
